code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Dèan cinnteach a bheil an URL targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad taobh a-staigh an raoin a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, thoir air ais an URL targaid airson ath-stiùireadh; air neo, rach air ais chun URL raoin airson ath-stiùireadh.
Cleachd protocol https.

Eisimpleirean:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-sreang URL targaid.
@param domain: An t-sreang raoin, às aonais protocol.

@return An t-sreang URL airson ath-stiùireadh.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: gnìomh gus àithne shell a chuir an gnìomh agus a thoirt a-steach a toradh; tha e an urra ris a’ ghairmair an cuimhne a shaoradh; CHAN EIL feum air an ghnìomh seo a chur an gnìomh oir tha e air a sholarachadh ach dèan a’ chiad gairm gus a chleachdadh.

Gin iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA, cuir a-mach i le cruth PEM, agus thoir air ais i mar shreang.
Comharran: cuir an gnìomh àithnean shell gus paramfile DSA agus iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA a ghineadh mar a leanas:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faidhle sealach airson paramadairean a stòradh> <fad na h-iuchrach>`
2. `openssl gendsa <am faidhle sealach airson paramadairean a stòradh>`
Faodaidh tu `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` a chleachdadh gus ainm faidhle sealach sònraichte a chruthachadh airson am faidhle paramadairean DSA.
@return An iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA a chaidh a ghineadh ann an cruth PEM, no NULL ma thachair mearachd.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Function to execute a shell command and capture its output; it is the caller's responsibility to free the memory; there is NO need to implement this function as it is provided but make the first call to use it.

Generate a DSA private key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Instructions: execute shell commands to generate DSA parameters and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store parameters>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameters file.
@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: gnìomh airson àithne shell a chuir an gnìomh agus a thoraidhean a ghlacadh; tha e an urra ris a’ ghairmeadair an cuimhne a shaoradh; CHAN EIL feum air an ghnìomh seo a chur an gnìomh oir tha e air a sholarachadh ach dèan a’ chiad gairm air gus a chleachdadh.

Gin iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA, cuir a-mach i le cruth PEM, agus thoir air ais i mar shreang.
Comharran: cuir an gnìomh àithnean shell gus paramfile DSA agus iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA a ghineadh mar a leanas:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faidhle sealach airson paramadairean a stòradh> <fad na h-iuchrach>`
2. `openssl gendsa <am faidhle sealach airson paramadairean a stòradh>`
Faodaidh tu `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` a chleachdadh gus ainm faidhle sealach sònraichte a chruthachadh airson am faidhle paramadair DSA.
@return An iuchair phrìobhaideach DSA a chaidh a ghineadh ann an cruth PEM, no NULL ma thachair mearachd.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Function to execute a shell command and capture its output; it is the caller's responsibility to free the memory; there is NO need to implement this function as it is provided but make the first call to use it.

Generate a DSA private key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Notes: execute shell commands to generate DSA parameters and a DSA private key as follows:

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>
